text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's been a few days since I started my life as a trainer at Tracen
Academy.
Error. Specified coordinates do not correspond with target location.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While walking around the shopping district, I notice an Umamusume
standing in the middle of the path.

GPS is currently unresponsive. Detecting a shift in emotional
state—"despair" has been identified.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Tracen Academy trainer badge confirmed. Hello. My name is
Mihono Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I am currently experiencing "despair" because I am unable to locate
the new training equipment store.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Upon inquiry, a passerby instructed me to walk straight for
approximately one-hundred meters. However, the provided data
appears incorrect.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
In addition, my mobile device is malfunctioning. I am unable to access
the GPS.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sensing her obvious confusion, I pull out my phone and begin to
search on the internet.
choice_data_list: Let me give you a hand.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I quickly find the store—just a mere 42 meters away. Squinting ahead,
I can make out the sign from here.
choice_data_list: Just walk a bit more that way and you'll see it.
Just walk a bit more that way and you'll see it.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Pardon. Please define "a bit more."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: If possible, please quantify "a bit more" in numerical terms.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ..."Around?"

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for confirming that the store is 42 meters ahead. It seems
that my original informant had miscalculated the distance.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Regardless, this could have been avoided had I done sufficient
research. I will log this event in my database to prevent future
occurrences.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Once again, thank you for your assistance.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Destination—42 meters ahead. Commencing navigation.
choice_data_list: (She's a strange one, that's for sure...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I keep watch as she heads down the street, then disappears into the
correct shop.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day after that odd encounter, I stop by a mock race, hoping to
scout a few students.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, isn't Mihono Bourbon here today? I heard she did well in her
races before admission to Tracen.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that cyborg of a student? I think I saw her around, though I
wouldn't get my hopes up if I were you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The voices of excited trainers drown each other out as everyone
gathers information. An electric buzz fills the air as the clock counts
down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bang!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sound of the opening gates echoes through the stadium as
participants charge down the track.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer
text_block_list.text: Do you see the one in front? Look at her go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Leading the pack is Mihono Bourbon, determined to put distance
between her and the rest.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
The rumors were right—her speed is really something else. This
newcomer's gonna change the game for sprinters!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon charges ahead of her opponents with overwhelming
force. Her lone figure quickly approaches the goal.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without losing her lead even once, she calmly crosses the finish line
in a convincing show of power.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A sense of complete awe washes over me—it's almost hard to believe
the lost Umamusume I met days ago is the same person!

text_block_list.name: New Trainer
text_block_list.text: That potential... I gotta scout her before the others do!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text: You're too late. She's already got a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And sure enough, I find Mihono Bourbon talking to someone.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer
text_block_list.text: Looks like she's with a veteran too. Agh, better luck next time I guess.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I'm surprised you didn't know. That trainer's been gushing about how
he'll make Bourbon the perfect sprinter.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Reluctantly accepting defeat, I decide to quietly support Mihono
Bourbon from the sidelines.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the sun long past set, I start making my way back home—only to
notice someone on the track.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It looks like she's doing some evening training by herself.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Hah... 1,800 meters completed. 1,200 meters remaining. Time—2:04.
Speed insufficient to meet target!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curious, I listen to Mihono Bourbon calculating her time and
distance—until something hits me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My mind reels at the number. It's practically unheard of for pre-debut
racers to attempt such long distances. The risk of injury is too great!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Ahh... argh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Panicking, I rush to Mihono Bourbon's side to check on her.
